name: universal-model-router
description: The ultimate AI model router - route requests between OpenAI, Anthropic, local models, and more

scripts.bench:setup: cd bench && echo 'Building mock-server...' && docker-compose build mock-server && echo 'Building apimap (this may take a while)...' && docker-compose build apimap
scripts.bench:full: cd bench && BENCHMARK_ALL_PROTOCOLS=true bun run src/benchmark/index.ts
scripts.bench:endpoints: cd bench && BENCHMARK_ALL_PROTOCOLS=true bun run src/benchmark/index.ts --protocols all
